meta.name: pcf-manifest-schema
meta.title: Pcf Manifest Schema Skill
meta.description: Complete manifest schema reference for PCF components with all available XML elements Triggers on: **/*.xml

original_definition.skill_description: Complete manifest schema reference for PCF components with all available XML elements Triggers on: **/*.xml

actions.name: The manifest file (`ControlManifest.Input.xml`) is a metadat
actions.description: The manifest file (`ControlManifest.Input.xml`) is a metadata document that defines your code component. This reference lists all available manifest e

actions.name: Refers to the resource file that implements the component lo
actions.description: Refers to the resource file that implements the component logic.

actions.name: `path`: Path to the TypeScript/JavaScript implementation fil
actions.description: `path`: Path to the TypeScript/JavaScript implementation file

actions.name: Defines the component itself, including namespace, version,
actions.description: Defines the component itself, including namespace, version, and display information.

actions.name: Defines an input or output property for the component.
actions.description: Defines an input or output property for the component.

actions.name: Defines a group of types that a property can accept.
actions.description: Defines a group of types that a property can accept.

actions.name: Defines a dataset property for working with tabular data.
actions.description: Defines a dataset property for working with tabular data.

actions.name: Defines custom events that the component can raise.
actions.description: Defines custom events that the component can raise.

actions.name: Defines platform actions that the component can invoke.

rules.description: Availability: Model-driven apps (canvas apps with limitations)
Declares external dependencies required by the component.
The manifest schema is validated during the build process:
Missing required elements will cause build errors
Use `pac pcf` commands to validate manifest structure

directives.description: The root element that contains the entire component definition.
Availability: Model-driven apps, canvas apps, portals
Usage: Allows a property to accept multiple data types
Container for all resource definitions (code, CSS, images, localization).
Declares that the component uses a specific platform feature.
Declares external services that the component uses.
`enabled`: Whether external service usage is enabled (true/false)
